name: The University of Alabama — College of Education
description: The College of Education at The University of Alabama issues microcredentials recognizing demonstrated, evidence-backed competencies in educational design, assessment, and technology integration.
_note_did: Issuer identity is did:web:teachplay.dev. Verifiers resolve the DID document at https://teachplay.dev/.well-known/did.json (see repo: .well-known/did.json) to obtain the Ed25519 verification method. The legacy HTTPS profile URL is retained via alsoKnownAs for cache-warm verifiers. See https://www.w3.org/TR/did-core/ and https://w3c-ccg.github.io/did-method-web/.
